data.content:
The Blazor Web App is ready. Here's what was created:

**Project structure:**
- `Models/Recipe.cs` — Recipe and submission models
- `Services/RecipeService.cs` — In-memory data store with 8 seed recipes across 5 categories
- `Components/Pages/Home.razor` — Homepage with category cards (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/Recipes/CategoryPage.razor` — Browse recipes by category (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/Recipes/RecipePage.razor` — Recipe detail with ingredients & steps (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/Recipes/StarRating.razor` — Interactive 1–5 star rating widget (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)
- `Components/Pages/Recipes/SubmitRecipe.razor` — Interactive form to submit recipes (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)

**Key design decisions:**
- Most pages render as static SSR (no SignalR overhead)
- Only the star-rating widget and submit form use `InteractiveServer` mode — the minimal interactive surface
- Navigation updated to show Home and Submit Recipe links
